failedGates.repairHint: Evidence exists but is incomplete or missing required types. Improve evidence capture.
All criteria passed but one or more prior gates returned HOLD. Resolve prior gate issues first.

strategies.description: Standard repair — fix the specific failures identified below.
actions: Review each failed criterion and its evidence.
Make targeted code changes to address the failures.
Ensure diff evidence is generated for code changes.
Run tests to produce test_output evidence.
Check that file changes stay within allowed namespaces.
Run "praxis verify" after making changes to confirm fixes.
Check that all acceptance criteria are addressed.
Ensure human approval flag is set where needed.

summary: Repair packet generated for attempt hermes-issue-001. 2 gate(s) non-passing, 0 criterion/criteria failed.

diagnostics.message: One or more prior gates returned HOLD. FinalGate will evaluate criteria but overall pipeline is HOLD.
